grounded_answer:
I'd be happy to help you with your issue.

To track the status of your order, you can try checking the carrier's website or using the Stryde app under the "My Orders" section. However, since the tracking hasn't updated in a week, it's possible that there may be an issue with the delivery.

I recommend reaching out to our escalation team so we can assist you further. Please have your order number (ORD-4892), email address or phone number associated with your Stryde account, and any relevant photos ready when contacting us. We'll do our best to resolve this issue as quickly as possible and get your sneakers delivered to you in time for the event.

Please let me know if there's anything else I can assist you with.

ticket_text: I'm looking at the Stryde Runner Pro on your website. Does it come in wide fit? I have slightly wider feet and I'm between UK 10 and UK 11. What would you recommend?
query_used: product_question I'm looking at the Stryde Runner Pro on your website. Does it come in wide fit? I have slightly wider feet and I'm between UK 10 and UK 11. What would you recommend?

retrieved_chunks.text: wide feet, we recommend the Runner or Flex series over the Classic or Urban lines.

# Stryde Size Guide

Finding the right fit is essential for comfort and performance, and at Stryde we want to help you pick the perfect size every time. Our sneakers are designed using Indian sizing s
to UK 9, 28 cm to UK 10, and 29 cm to UK 11. We recommend measuring both feet, as it is common for one foot to be slightly larger — always go with the larger measurement.

grounded_answer:
According to the size guide, if you have wide feet, they recommend the Runner or Flex series over the Classic or Urban lines. However, since the Runner Pro is part of the Runner line, it's likely that it does come in a wide fit.

Since you're between UK 10 and UK 11, I would recommend checking the size chart for the Runner Pro specifically to see if there are any options available in your size range. If not, you may want to consider sizing up to a UK 11 or even looking into the Flex series as an alternative option.

To be eligible for a return, items must be in their original condition — unworn, unwashed, and with all original tags attached. We ask that you return items in their original Stryde packaging, includi

grounded_answer:
I'd be happy to help you with your refund inquiry.

According to our process, once the returned item reaches our warehouse, our quality team inspects it within 24 hours to confirm that it meets our return conditions. After the inspection is complete and approved, the refund is initiated immediately.

However, the time it takes for the refund to appear in your account depends on your original payment method. We can't provide an exact timeline, but we'll look into this further.

Can you please check with your bank or original payment method to see if there are any issues or delays on their end? If you're still experiencing issues, feel free to contact our support team and we'll work together to find a resolution.
